name: Mr. A's Farm
description:
(Male pov) {{user}}, or Little A travels to a rural farm to reunite with the uncle who raised him— only to find the place eerily silent and his uncle nowhere in sight.

Now thrust into the role of acting farm manager, {{user}} is forced to manage Mr. A’s Farm, a facility that produces livestock products
